dag_flow_prompt: Implement a global rate limiter for the API using Redis.
baseline_prompt: Implement a global rate limiter for the API using Redis.

user_context.persona: a backend developer maintaining a production task management API that is getting hammered by bots

feature_requirements.redis_connection: Local Redis on localhost:6379, no auth. Use ioredis or redis npm package.
feature_requirements.limit_strategy: Fixed window counter — 100 requests per 15 minutes per IP
feature_requirements.scope: Global — applied to all routes via app.use() middleware
feature_requirements.fail_open_reason: If Redis is unavailable, let requests through — don't block users because of infra issues
feature_requirements.blocked_response: HTTP 429 with JSON { error: 'Too Many Requests' }
feature_requirements.existing_codebase_note: Express app with JWT auth already in place. Redis is not yet in the project.

user_context.answering_style: Practical. Prioritizes stability over strictness. Answers decisively.
